center.name: 布喀島
center.summary: 布喀島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Red-capped myzomela、太平洋文鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Solomon Islands archipelago (Buka, Bougainville, the Shortland Islands, Fauro, Choiseul and Santa Isabel)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The buff-bellied mannikin (Lonchura melaena), also known as the sooty munia or Bismarck munia, is a species of estrildid finch found in New Britain and Buka Island
